run_bash_command: run a bash command in the shell with a specified timeout and working directory
execute_shell_command: execute a shell command asynchronously and capture stdout and stderr output
run_command_with_timeout: run a bash command that kills the process if it exceeds the timeout limit
run_command_in_directory: run a bash command in a specific working directory path
truncate_command_output: truncate command output if it exceeds the maximum line or byte limits
